title: Phlegmariurus pittieri
taxonomy: Phlegmariurus pittieri belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida, a group of vascular plants commonly known as lycopods. This class is further divided into several orders, with Phlegmariurus pittieri being a part of the Hymnales order. Within the order Hymnales, Phlegmariurus pittieri is classified under the family Hymenophyllaceae, a family of small to medium-sized, leafy lycopods. The family Hymenophyllaceae is divided into several genera, with Phlegmariurus pittieri being a part of the genus Phlegmariurus. This classification places Phlegmariurus pittieri within the larger kingdom Plantae, which encompasses all plant species.
